metadata.description: Local dev marketplace for the br8n plugin — context capture + 30-second resume card on a self-contained Delapan engine fork.

plugins.name: br8n
plugins.description: Capture developer intent on interruption and replay it as a 30-second resume card. /br8n:pickup, /br8n:capture, /br8n:search, /br8n:explore over the br8n MCP server.
